354 GG0170K2_WLK_150_BYGOAL_CD GG0170K2_WLK_150_BYGOAL_CD GG0170K2 Discharge Goal Walk 150 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to walk at least 150 feet in a room, corridor or similar
